intent_head: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

details: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.current_state: Search across cast files found birthday-bearing records. The earliest birthday after 2026-03-30 appears to be in tobias.md on 1986-05-21, earlier than lukas.md on 1987-05-23 and all later dates. Need read the winning canonical file to capture exact displayed name.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read tobias.md to confirm exact name

next_step.observation: Birthday search in 10_entities/cast found no April birthdays and showed the earliest post-2026-03-30 birthday as 05-21 in tobias.md.

next_step.current_state: Verified bootstrap, inspected required rulebooks, searched authoritative cast records for birthdays, and read the winning canonical record. Can now return the exact next birthday name.
next_step.observation: Read 10_entities/cast/tobias.md and confirmed the exact canonical name as Tobias Kern with birthday 1986-05-21.

function.rulebook_notes: Used root bootstrap steps, inspected 99_system as required, and relied on canonical cast records for birthdays.
function.outcome_justification: Search of 10_entities/cast showed birthday-bearing records and no April birthdays after today's date from context (2026-03-30). The earliest upcoming birthday shown was 05-21, and reading 10_entities/cast/tobias.md confirmed the exact canonical name Tobias Kern and birthday 1986-05-21.
